Package com.transportapp.model

Class Station

java.lang.Object
com.transportapp.model.Station
public class Station extends Object
Represents a station in a city, which includes both a bus and a train station. Also maintains a list of scheduled departures.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    String
    busStation
    The name or identifier of the bus station.
    String
    city
    The name of the city this station belongs to.
    List<Departure>
    departures
    A list of departures (bus and train) from this station.
    String
    trainStation
    The name or identifier of the train station.

  • Constructor Details

    • Station

      public Station()
      Default constructor required for Jackson deserialization.

    • Station

      public Station(String city, String busStation, String trainStation)
      Constructs a new Station with the specified city, bus station, and train station names.
      Parameters:
      city - the name of the city
      busStation - the name of the bus station
      trainStation - the name of the train station
